title: Mortar and Pestle, Made of Heavy Duty Polished Hard Stone, Natural Stone Grinder for Spices, Pastes, Herbs, Seasoning etc. (Green Tree of Life)
description:
About this item
THE PERFECT BLEND OF FORM AND FUNCTION! - The mortar and pestle have been used for centuries as the perfect way to grind and mix ingredients. This age-old tool is engraved with the Green tree of life, a symbol of growth and vitality.
CLASSIC DESIGNING: The outer polished surface engraving makes it look trendy and exotic when placed on the shelf of your kitchen. The inner part of the mortar is rough that provides an excellent surface for dry and wet mixing. The pestle is made in such a manner that it makes full contact with all the ingredients and bring out the hidden flavors that are usually missed with machine- grinding. It comes with a broad and narrow end, both of which can be used depending on the purpose.
ANTI-SKID BASE & MULTI-PURPOSE USE: The Mortar & Pestle comes with an anti-skid base that keeps the unit at the place while intensely mashing the spices and the chutneys. Mortar and Pestle is the first invention for ensuring a perfect means of making a paste of otherwise hard substances. It can be used in so many different places like the kitchen, pharmacy, Ayurveda centers, and laboratory.
DURABILITY: The mortar and pestle, both are made of solid materials and it is so thick that it perfectly handles the pressure you give in. It is very easy to clean, carry, and if used cautiously can stay with you for years to come, without needing a replacement. The ideal distribution of weight brings about an outstanding balance regardless of the pressure applied, that you will fall in love with.
EASY TO USE & RISK-FREE PURCHASE: The product is extremely easy to use. You need to simply put the ingredients, wet or dry, into the mortar and crush it using the pestle to get a perfect paste with enriching flavors and taste. If for any reason our product fails to meet your expectations, you are welcome to return it for a hassle-free. we also replace it with no questions asked.
